title: Pen Pen is REAL
wikitext:
[]: Pen-Pen is REAL!             Quote Post by Darkman.exe213 » Thu Sep 16, 2010 3:35 am http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vDN3L621ASI Everything from being rescued to living like a human being to having its own special refrigerator to sleep in. It seems like relatively smart, too.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer137 » Thu Sep 16, 2010 9:11 am Look's like I have a penguin-napping planned for today. I need PenPen! Cleaver animal though. Wonder how close he is to a monkey in intelligence?

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Thu Sep 16, 2010 1:42 pm I want a penguin like that.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu Sep 16, 2010 4:08 pm That is one cool penguin.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Sep 16, 2010 4:14 pm That video was actually posted here, but ironically, it was removed from youtube for copyright violation . However, there are some links in that thread with the video + eva music in the background.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Sep 16, 2010 7:20 pm (This would be the expression if Asuka got used to hanging around with Pen-Pen) Now that's one handy penguin!

[]:             Quote Post by Darkman.exe213 » Fri Sep 17, 2010 1:21 am Gamer137 wrote: Look's like I have a penguin-napping planned for today. I need PenPen! Cleaver animal though. Wonder how close he is to a monkey in intelligence?

[]:             Quote Post by Bobbk » Tue Sep 21, 2010 5:02 am WARK WARK! That made me smile. The Pingu backpack is adorable!
